search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com domain as requested. Prioritized concrete guide pages over the home page. A single page should not be treated as proof for gameplay mechanics or costs.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster and equipment hub; useful for hero discovery, faction browsing, and character/equipment cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, and equipment context.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table hub with category list and per-level badge costs; useful for research discovery and cost cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge cost tables.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide that mentions early heroes and basic progression; useful for onboarding context and hero-related early-game reference.
results.primary_user_job: Understand early-game hero and progression basics.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Searched approved domain only. No matching pages were found for the query within the allowed source domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results found on www.last-z.wiki for this query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to the approved domain only. No indexed pages were found for the query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No search results from lastz-command-center-one.vercel.app matched the query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Limited to lastz.fandom.com per policy. Search surfaced one directly relevant event page plus supporting hero and event-system pages. Best discovery lead is Full Preparedness for research-related event mechanics.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle with an Age of Science phase tied to technologic research, plus a Hero Initiative phase tied to hero upgrades and recruitment tickets.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event window rewards research or hero upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Point sources for research and hero upgrades

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page with hero classes, power sources, and upgrade-related concepts that can support hero event cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Understand hero types and what affects hero strength.

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; useful for locating the event system and daily reset structure.
results.primary_user_job: Locate where world events are organized and reset.

search_records.search_notes: No approved-domain results were found for the exact query. Search was restricted to www.packsify.com only, per instructions.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching Packsify pages were returned for the requested Last Z gear guide query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com and surfaced several Last Z-specific guide pages. Results favored concrete building and system guides over generic pages.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page about the Shooter Camp building, covering training cap, training speed, unlocking requirements, and upgrade table data.
results.primary_user_job: Find Shooter Camp stats and upgrade planning data.

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for the Assaulter Camp with training cap, speed bonuses, power gains, and progression milestones.
results.primary_user_job: Find Assaulter Camp training and power progression details.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for the Laboratory, describing research functions, HQ gating, and second lab unlocking.
results.primary_user_job: Find research-building unlocks and lab progression info.
